zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：弱势震荡下行延续
zh.content:
价格66.4，短线偏弱，下降通道内震荡，动能减缓。连续回落后未能有效修复结构，整体仍处于空头主导，但低位整理迹象开始出现。

SMA20在69.15上方形成压制，MACD为负显示空头主导，反弹缺乏量能支撑。均线系统保持空头排列，短期趋势仍偏向下行，技术反抽多以修复为主。

下方支撑关注66.0与65.2，上方阻力69.0与70.5，区间收敛等待方向选择。若跌破支撑可能延伸下探，否则或进入弱势横盘整理阶段。

操作上建议反弹高空为主，突破69.5再考虑转多，严格控制止损防止假突破。仓位不宜过重，优先等待确认信号再顺势跟进。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD continues to trade under short-term bearish pressure following a rejection from the 69–70 region. Price action remains below the 20-day SMA at 69.15, confirming a weakening bullish structure. The market has shifted into a corrective phase, with lower highs forming since the recent peak. Momentum favors sellers, though downside movement remains relatively controlled rather than impulsive in the current session.

Indicator landscape reinforces the bearish bias. MACD is printing a negative value at -0.6036, suggesting sustained downside momentum and weak buying pressure. With RSI(14) unavailable, momentum confirmation relies more heavily on moving averages and price structure. Trading below SMA(20) at 69.15 signals that rallies are likely being sold into, and recovery attempts may struggle without volume expansion in the near term. Market sentiment remains fragile as buyers fail to reclaim momentum above short-term averages.

Immediate support is located near 66.2, aligned with the recent intraday low. A break below this level could expose deeper support around 64.8 and then 63.5, where previous consolidation occurred. On the upside, resistance is found at 67.9, followed by the stronger barrier at 69.1–69.2 SMA cluster. Price must reclaim this zone to shift bias back toward neutral for bullish continuation.

Trading strategy remains cautiously bearish while price holds below the SMA(20). Short positions may be considered on rallies toward 67.8–69.0 with tight risk control above resistance. Alternatively, conservative traders may wait for a confirmed breakdown below 66.2 to target lower liquidity zones. Risk management is critical due to potential volatility around key intraday levels this week.
